questionHtml: Deduce, giving a reason, the group of elements in the periodic table most likely to undergo sublimation.
markschemeHtml:
group 18/noble gases     [✔]

 

smallest difference between melting and boiling points
OR
weakest intermolecular forces «in that period»     [✔]

 

Note: Accept “group 17/halogens”.

meta.title: Deduce, giving a reason, the group of elements in the periodic table most likely to undergo sublimation.
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
